name: Ticket Prioritisation
body: [{"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Ticket Prioritisation"}], "data-id": "ticket-prioritisation"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The below matrix is to be used to determine the appropriate priority for a Support Incident. Using the Priority Matrix first, a number of points is assigned to the ticket based on the matching criteria. The number of points awarded determines the final priority leve."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this article:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#matrix", "children": [{"text": "Priority Matrix"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#score", "children": [{"text": "Priority Score"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Priority Matrix"}], "data-id": "priority-matrix"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To use the Priority Matrix add the points for each condition met in the table below.
